name: TARGETPAIRS_BY_PATHWAY
description: Target pairs by pathway. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (pw:Pathway {name: $pathway})<-[:IN_PATHWAY]-(t:Target)<-[:HAS_TARGET]-(tp:TargetPair)
RETURN DISTINCT tp.name AS target_pair
ORDER BY target_pair
LIMIT 50

examples: Which target pairs contain targets in the CLEC7A/inflammasome pathway pathway?
Which target pairs contain targets in the HIV Infection pathway?
Which target pairs contain targets in the Collagen chain trimerization pathway?
